title: Dense Briny Tunisian Tagine
description: A hearty and savory brunch dish featuring a rich chimichurri sauce and a blend of aromatic spices. Perfect for a weekend morning.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together the olive oil, onion, garlic, cumin, coriander, paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chickpeas to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Transfer the chickpea mixture to a 9x13 inch baking dish and bake for 30 minutes.
While the chickpeas are baking, prepare the chimichurri sauce by combining the parsley, olive oil, garlic, and lemon juice in a bowl.
Remove the chickpeas from the oven and top with the chimichurri sauce.
Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the tagine from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes before serving.
Serve the tagine hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
